title: Smoky Creamy Venezuelan Plantains Wrap
description: A whole30-friendly, smoky, creamy Venezuelan dish featuring capers and wrapped in a ssam-style wrap.
instructions: Peel the plantains and slice them into 1-inch thick rounds.
Heat the coconut oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and sauté for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the smoked paprika and stir for 30 seconds.
Add the plantain rounds and cook for 3-4 minutes per side.
Transfer the plantains to a plate and set aside.
Add the capers to the skillet and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Stir in the lime juice and cook for an additional minute.
Warm the ssam-style wraps according to package instructions.
Assemble the wraps by placing a few plantain slices on each wrap, followed by a spoonful of the caper mixture.
Garnish with cilantro leaves, if desired.
